entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The cereal crop being discussed in the context of Indian cultivars and land races

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the traditional sorghum cultivars and land races are grown

entities.name: STRESS CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental pressures that traditional sorghum cultivars are selected to survive

entities.name: HIGH PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: A desired agricultural trait that traditional sorghum cultivars were not primarily selected for

entities.name: TALL STATURE
entities.description: A physical characteristic of traditional sorghum cultivars

entities.name: LATE MATURITY
entities.description: A growth characteristic of traditional sorghum cultivars

entities.name: LOCALIZED ADAPTATION
entities.description: The ability of traditional sorghum cultivars to adapt to specific local environments

entities.name: LOW HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: A characteristic of traditional sorghum cultivars relating to the ratio of grain to total biomass

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing crop characteristics for better productivity or resilience

entities.name: SORGHUM GERMPLASM
entities.description: The genetic resources of sorghum used for crop improvement
